generated_note: MOCK schema imitating SimCorp-style cryptic names with human-written comments. In the real system this file is produced by connection.py introspecting Oracle (ALL_TAB_COLUMNS / ALL_COL_COMMENTS / ALL_CONSTRAINTS).

PORTFOLIOS_POC.comment: Investment portfolios managed by the firm

MGR_ID.comment: Manager identifier who owns this portfolio

MKT_VAL.comment: Total market value of the portfolio in base currency

CCY.comment: Base currency code of the portfolio

INCEPT_DT.comment: Inception date when the portfolio was opened

MGR_NAME.comment: Full name of the portfolio manager

DESK.comment: Trading desk or team the manager belongs to

SECURITIES.comment: Master list of tradable securities / instruments

ASSET_CLS.comment: Asset class such as equity bond cash derivative

SEC_CCY.comment: Currency the security is denominated in

PRICE.comment: Latest market price of the security

HOLDINGS.comment: Positions held by each portfolio in each security

PF_ID.comment: Portfolio identifier this holding belongs to

MKT_VAL.comment: Market value of this holding in base currency

WEIGHT.comment: Weight of the holding as a percentage of the portfolio

AS_OF_DT.comment: As of date valuation date of the holding
